headline: Should communities be 'excited' about AI data center projects?
summary: Former Amazon Web Services (AMZN) CEO Adam Selipsky is leading the charge as the chief executive of Helix Digital Infrastructure, a new AI venture backed by $10 billion from a group led by investment firm KKR (KKR). Selipsky sits down with Julie Hyman to address the community responses to AI data centers and the many critiques, including water consumption, of these facilities.
